homepage.heroSubline: Delbert Masterson & Son Painting delivers quality results, on time and on budget. Get a free quote today!
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Painting Excellence in Louisville
aboutText: Delbert Masterson started this company with a simple goal: provide honest, reliable painting services to the Louisville community. Now, with my son by my side, we continue that tradition, combining old-school values with modern techniques.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. That means thorough prep work, using premium paints, and paying attention to every detail. Our reputation is built on quality craftsmanship and customer satisfaction.

We're proud to call Louisville home, and we're committed to giving back to the community that has supported us for so long. From sponsoring local youth sports to volunteering at neighborhood events, we're invested in making Louisville a better place.

valueProps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We're not happy until you're happy. Your satisfaction is our top priority.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote from Delbert Masterson & Son Painting today!

services.name: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Transform your living spaces with our expert interior painting services.
services.description:
Delbert Masterson & Son Painting provides comprehensive interior painting services, tailored to the unique needs of Louisville homes. From historic shotgun houses in Old Louisville to modern condos downtown, we handle all types of interior spaces. Our meticulous process includes thorough surface preparation, drywall repair, and careful application of premium paints. We protect your furniture and flooring, and ensure a clean, professional finish. Whether you're looking to refresh a single room or repaint your entire home, we'll work with you to choose the perfect colors and create a beautiful, inviting atmosphere. We understand the challenges of older homes in Louisville, with their plaster walls and unique architectural details, and we have the experience to handle them with care.

We start with a detailed consultation to understand your vision and assess the condition of your walls. Then, we meticulously prepare the surfaces, filling cracks, sanding imperfections, and applying primer as needed. We use only high-quality paints that are durable, washable, and resistant to fading. Our experienced painters apply multiple coats for a flawless, long-lasting finish.

Finally, we clean up thoroughly, leaving your home spotless and ready to enjoy. We take pride in our workmanship and strive to exceed your expectations.
process: Step 3: Careful Application of Primer and Paint
benefits: Enhance the beauty and value of your home
Create a fresh, inviting atmosphere
Protect your walls from damage
Improve indoor air quality

faq.question: How long does interior painting usually take?
faq.answer: The duration depends on the size of the space and the complexity of the job. We'll provide an estimated timeline during the consultation.

faq.question: Do you help with color selection?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can offer expert advice and help you choose the perfect colors to complement your home's style and your personal taste.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use?
faq.answer: We use only premium-quality paints from trusted brands, known for their durability, color retention, and low VOC content.

services.name: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your home with our expert exterior painting services.
services.description:
Delbert Masterson & Son Painting specializes in exterior painting services that protect your Louisville home from the elements and enhance its curb appeal. Our team understands the unique challenges posed by Louisville's climate, from hot, humid summers to cold, wet winters. We use durable, weather-resistant paints and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting finish. Whether you own a brick bungalow in the Highlands or a Victorian home in Old Louisville, we have the expertise to handle any type of exterior surface, including wood, stucco, siding, and brick. We properly prepare all surfaces by power washing, scraping loose paint, and priming bare wood.

We understand that exterior painting is not just about aesthetics; it's also about protecting your home from water damage, insects, and other environmental factors. That's why we use only the highest-quality paints and materials, and we pay close attention to detail. We caulk all cracks and seams to prevent water intrusion, and we apply multiple coats of paint for maximum protection.

Our commitment to customer satisfaction is unwavering. We'll work closely with you throughout the entire process to ensure that you're happy with the results. We'll also provide you with a detailed warranty so you can rest assured that your investment is protected.
process: Step 1: Thorough Power Washing and Surface Cleaning
Step 2: Scraping Loose Paint and Priming Bare Wood
Step 4: Application of Premium Exterior Paint
benefits: Protect your home from the elements
Enhance curb appeal and property value
Prevent water damage and insect infestation
Extend the life of your siding

faq.question: How often should I repaint my home's exterior?
faq.answer: Typically, every 5-10 years, depending on the type of siding and the severity of the weather exposure.

faq.question: Do you offer color consultations for exterior painting?
faq.answer: Yes, we can help you choose the perfect colors to complement your home's architecture and landscaping.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use for exterior painting?
faq.answer: We use high-quality, weather-resistant paints specifically designed for exterior use.

services.name: Cabinet Refinishing
services.shortDescription: Give your kitchen a fresh new look with our cabinet refinishing services.
services.description:
Transform your kitchen without the expense of replacing your cabinets. Delbert Masterson & Son Painting offers expert cabinet refinishing services that can breathe new life into your kitchen or bathroom. We carefully remove doors and drawers, thoroughly clean and sand the surfaces, and apply a durable, beautiful finish. Whether you want to update the color, change the sheen, or simply refresh the existing finish, we can help. We understand the importance of proper preparation and use only high-quality products to ensure a long-lasting result. Many Louisville homes feature older cabinetry that, while structurally sound, may look dated. Refinishing is a cost-effective way to update your kitchen's aesthetic.

Our cabinet refinishing process involves several key steps. First, we carefully remove all hardware and thoroughly clean the cabinet surfaces to remove grease, grime, and old finishes. Next, we sand the surfaces to create a smooth, even base for the new finish. We then apply a primer to ensure proper adhesion of the paint or stain. Finally, we apply multiple coats of your chosen finish, allowing each coat to dry completely before applying the next.

We can also replace hardware, such as knobs and pulls, to further enhance the look of your cabinets. Our goal is to provide you with a kitchen that you'll love for years to come.
process: Step 1: Careful Removal of Doors and Drawers
Step 2: Thorough Cleaning and Sanding of Surfaces
benefits: Save money compared to replacing cabinets
Update the look of your kitchen or bathroom
Extend the life of your cabinets
Customize the color and finish to your liking

faq.question: How long does cabinet refinishing take?
faq.answer: Typically, 3-5 days, depending on the size of the kitchen and the complexity of the job.

faq.question: Can you match my existing cabinet color?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match virtually any color using our advanced color-matching technology.

faq.question: What type of finish do you use for cabinet refinishing?
faq.answer: We use durable, moisture-resistant finishes specifically designed for kitchen and bathroom cabinets.

services.name: Drywall Repair
services.shortDescription: Seamless drywall repair to restore your walls to their original condition.
services.description:
From minor dents and dings to major holes and water damage, Delbert Masterson & Son Painting provides expert drywall repair services. We understand that damaged drywall can detract from the appearance of your home and even affect its structural integrity. That's why we offer prompt, reliable drywall repair services to restore your walls to their original condition. We carefully patch holes, repair cracks, and smooth out imperfections, leaving you with a seamless, paint-ready surface. Many Louisville homes, especially older ones, experience drywall cracks due to settling or foundation movement. We have the experience to properly address these issues.

Our drywall repair process involves several key steps. First, we carefully assess the damage and determine the best course of action. Next, we remove any loose or damaged drywall and clean the area. We then apply a patch or fill the hole with joint compound, carefully smoothing it out to create a seamless surface. We allow the joint compound to dry completely before sanding it smooth. Finally, we prime the repaired area and apply a coat of paint to match the surrounding wall.

We take pride in our attention to detail and strive to provide you with a flawless finish. Our goal is to make your walls look as good as new.
benefits: Restore your walls to their original condition
Improve the appearance of your home
Prevent further damage
Increase property value

faq.question: How much does drywall repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the size and severity of the damage. We'll provide a free estimate after assessing the situation.

faq.question: Can you match the existing texture of my walls?
faq.answer: Yes, we have the expertise to match virtually any texture.

faq.question: How long does drywall repair take?
faq.answer: Typically, 1-2 days, depending on the extent of the damage.

services.name: Deck Staining & Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your deck with our professional staining and sealing services.
services.description:
Delbert Masterson & Son Painting offers expert deck staining and sealing services to protect your Louisville deck from the elements and enhance its natural beauty. We understand that decks are a valuable extension of your home, providing a space for relaxation and entertainment. That's why we offer comprehensive deck staining and sealing services to keep your deck looking its best for years to come. We carefully clean and prepare the deck surface, apply a high-quality stain or sealant, and ensure a uniform, long-lasting finish. Louisville's humid summers and cold winters can take a toll on decks, making regular maintenance essential.

Our deck staining and sealing process involves several key steps. First, we thoroughly clean the deck surface to remove dirt, mildew, and old finishes. Next, we sand the surface to create a smooth, even base for the stain or sealant. We then apply a high-quality stain or sealant that is specifically designed for outdoor use. Finally, we allow the finish to dry completely before allowing foot traffic on the deck.

We offer a variety of stain and sealant options to choose from, including clear sealers, semi-transparent stains, and solid stains. We can help you choose the perfect product to complement your home's style and your personal taste. Our goal is to provide you with a deck that you can enjoy for many years to come.
process: Step 1: Thorough Cleaning of Deck Surface
Step 3: Application of Stain or Sealant
benefits: Protect your deck from the elements
Enhance the natural beauty of the wood
Extend the life of your deck
Prevent rot and decay

faq.question: How often should I stain or seal my deck?
faq.answer: Typically, every 1-3 years, depending on the type of wood and the severity of the weather exposure.

faq.question: What type of stain or sealant do you recommend?
faq.answer: We recommend high-quality, oil-based stains or sealants that are specifically designed for outdoor use.

faq.question: Can you repair damaged deck boards?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair or replace damaged deck boards as needed.

services.name: Wallpaper Removal
services.shortDescription: Safely and efficiently remove old wallpaper to prepare your walls for painting.
services.description:
Removing old wallpaper can be a tedious and time-consuming task. Delbert Masterson & Son Painting offers professional wallpaper removal services to make the process easy and stress-free. We carefully remove the wallpaper without damaging the walls, prepare the surfaces for painting, and leave you with a smooth, paint-ready finish. Many older homes in Louisville still have wallpaper, and proper removal is essential for a professional paint job.

Our wallpaper removal process involves several key steps. First, we protect your floors and furniture with drop cloths. Next, we score the wallpaper to allow the removal solution to penetrate. We then apply a wallpaper removal solution and allow it to soak in for a specified amount of time. Finally, we carefully peel off the wallpaper, using a putty knife to remove any stubborn pieces. We then clean the walls thoroughly and repair any damage.

We understand that wallpaper removal can be messy and time-consuming. That's why we offer this service to our customers, allowing them to focus on other aspects of their home renovation project. Our goal is to provide you with a smooth, paint-ready surface that is free of wallpaper residue.
process: Step 1: Protection of Floors and Furniture
Step 3: Application of Wallpaper Removal Solution
benefits: Save time and effort
Prevent damage to your walls
Prepare your walls for painting
Ensure a smooth, paint-ready surface

faq.question: How long does wallpaper removal take?
faq.answer: Typically, 1-3 days, depending on the size of the room and the type of wallpaper.

faq.question: Do you repair any damage caused by wallpaper removal?
faq.answer: Yes, we repair any minor damage to the walls, such as holes or scratches.

faq.question: What do you do with the old wallpaper?
faq.answer: We dispose of the old wallpaper properly.

serviceAreas.content:
Delbert Masterson & Son Painting is proud to serve the Louisville metropolitan area. With years of experience painting homes and businesses throughout the city, we understand the unique architectural styles and weather conditions that can affect paint jobs in Louisville. Whether you're in historic Old Louisville or a modern neighborhood in the East End, our team is equipped to handle any painting project. 

We use only the highest quality paints and materials to ensure a long-lasting and beautiful finish. Our services include interior painting, exterior painting, drywall repair, and power washing. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and exceeding your expectations.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Delbert and his team did an amazing job painting the interior of my Highlands bungalow! They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is outstanding. I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired Delbert Masterson & Son Painting to paint our Victorian home in Old Louisville. The prep work was thorough, and the finished product is beautiful. A few minor touch-ups were needed, but they were quick to respond and address them.

reviews.name: Lisa K.
reviews.text: I was amazed at how Delbert Masterson & Son Painting transformed my kitchen cabinets! They look brand new, and it saved me a ton of money compared to replacing them. They even helped me pick out new hardware.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: After a plumbing leak, we had a large hole in our drywall. Delbert Masterson & Son Painting repaired it seamlessly, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage. Great work!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Our deck was looking worn and faded. Delbert Masterson & Son Painting stained and sealed it, and now it looks fantastic! They were very professional and cleaned up thoroughly after the job.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Delbert and his son painted our entire house, and they did a phenomenal job. Very professional, courteous and cleaned up everything. Would highly recommend!
